channel.title: DigitalBlackOutIran
channel.description: Automated daily estimates of the global economic exposure linked to Iran's internet blackout.

item.title: Iran outage economic impact update — day 22
item.description: Day 22 of the Iran outage: our model estimates $167.54M in daily global GDP exposure. Top exposed economies today: United States: $70.58M/day; China: $68.40M/da

item.title: Iran outage economic impact update — day 21
item.description: Day 21 of the Iran outage: our model estimates $167.54M in daily global GDP exposure. Top exposed economies today: United States: $70.58M/day; China: $68.40M/da
